tags.name: SectionChangelog
Auth
tags.description:
Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 REST API authorization process involves obtaining an access token - a string that represents authorization issued to the user and that must be send in the *Bearer \<Access-Token\>* format in the `Authorization` header in all requests during the current logon session.

<!-- ReDoc-Inject: <securitySchemes> -->
The `/token` resource collection allows a Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 user to authenticate himself and authorize his access to the Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 REST API. For more information about the authorization process and security settings, see the Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 REST API Reference, section [Authorization and Security](https://helpcenter.veeam.com/references/vbo365/8/rest/tag/SectionOverview#section/Authorization-and-Security).

The `/token/AuthCode` resource allows you to obtain a one-time authorization code that is required to complete authentication.

tags.name: Account
tags.description: The `/Accounts` resource collection represents cloud credentials that you use to access cloud storage services.

tags.name: EC2Resources
tags.description: The `/EC2Resources` resource collection represents Amazon archiver appliance resources.

tags.name: AmazonS3ObjectStorage
tags.description: The `/S3Resources` resource collection represents Amazon S3 object storage buckets and folders.
tags.x-displayName: Amazon S3 Object Storage Buckets and Folders

tags.name: Application
tags.description: The `/Organizations/{organizationId}/Applications` resource collection represents Microsoft Entra applications in Microsoft Entra ID.

tags.name: OrganizationAudit
tags.description:
The `/Organizations/{organizationId}/AuditItems` resource collection allows you to manage audit items. Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 tracks access to backed-up data of a specific user or group and sends audit email notifications for each operation performed with the backed-up data of a specific user or group.

For more information, see the Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 REST API Reference, section [Backed-Up Data Audit](https://helpcenter.veeam.com/references/vbo365/8/rest/tag/SectionOverview#section/Backed-Up-Data-Audit).

tags.name: AuditEmailSettings
tags.description:
The `/AuditEmailSettings` resource collection allows you to configure audit notification settings. Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 sends audit email notifications for each operation performed with the backed-up data of a specific user or group.

For more information, see the Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 REST API Reference, section [Backed-Up Data Audit](https://helpcenter.veeam.com/references/vbo365/8/rest/tag/SectionOverview#section/Backed-Up-Data-Audit).

tags.name: AzureObjectStorage
tags.description: The `/AzureResources` resource collection represents Azure Blob Storage containers and folders.
tags.x-displayName: Azure Blob Object Storage Containers and Folders

tags.name: AzureServiceAccounts
tags.description: The `/AzureServiceAccounts` resource collection represents Microsoft Azure service accounts that are required to use the Azure archiver appliance when transferring backed-up data between different instances of Azure Blob Storage or to Azure Blob Storage Archive during backup copy jobs.

tags.name: OrganizationBackupAccounts
tags.description:
The `/Organizations/{organizationId}/BackupAccounts` resource collection represents auxiliary backup accounts configured for Microsoft 365 organizations to minimize throttling when backing up Microsoft SharePoint and OneDrive for Business data.

Backup accounts can be configured for Microsoft 365 organizations added using either basic authentication or modern authentication with legacy protocols allowed.

tags.name: JobSessionLog
tags.description: The `/JobSessions/{sessionId}/LogItems` resource collection represents information about the operations performed during a backup or backup copy job session.
tags.x-displayName: Backup and Backup Copy Job Session Operations

tags.name: JobSession
tags.description: The `/JobSessions` resource collection represents backup and backup copy job sessions.
tags.x-displayName: Backup and Backup Copy Job Sessions

tags.name: OrganizationBackupApplications
tags.description:
The `/Organizations/{organizationId}/BackupApplications` resource collection represents Microsoft Entra applications configured for Microsoft 365 organizations to minimize throttling when backing up Microsoft SharePoint and OneDrive for Business data.

Backup applications can be configured for Microsoft 365 organizations added using modern app-only authentication. For more information, see the [Backup Applications](https://helpcenter.veeam.com/docs/vbo365/guide/backup_applications.html?ver=80) section of the Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 User Guide.

The `/Organizations/{organizationId}/DeviceCode` resource allows you to obtain a device code to sign in to Microsoft Identity platform.

tags.name: CopyJob
tags.description: The `/CopyJobs` resource collection allows you to manage backup copy jobs.

tags.name: Job
tags.description: The `/Jobs` resource collection represents backup jobs created for Microsoft organizations and allows you to create and manage backup jobs.

tags.name: ProxyPool
tags.description: The `/ProxyPools` resource collection represents backup proxy pools in the Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 infrastructure.

tags.name: Proxy
tags.description: The `/Proxies` resource collection represents backup proxy servers in the Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 infrastructure.

tags.name: BackupRepository
tags.description: The `/BackupRepositories` resource collection represents backup repositories in the Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 infrastructure.

tags.name: RepositoryOwnerChangeSession
tags.description: The `/RepositoryOwnerChangeSessions` resource collection represents change owner sessions when Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 changes an owner for backup repositories from one to another.

tags.name: RepositorySynchronizeSessions
tags.description: The `/RepositorySynchronizeSessions` resource collection represents synchronization sessions when Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 synchronizes cache between object storage repositories and the *PersistentCache* database on the PostgreSQL instance.

tags.name: Configuration
tags.description: The `/Configuration` resource collection allows you to configure Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365.

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: The `/Reports` resource collection represents data protection reports, such as license overview, mailbox protection, user protection and storage consumption reports.

tags.name: DataRetrieval
tags.description: The `/DataRetrievals` resource collection allows you to manage retrieval jobs and get a resource representation of objects whose backed-up data was retrieved.

tags.name: DataRetrievalSessionLog
tags.description: The `/DataRetrievalSessions/{sessionId}/LogItems` resource collection represents information about the operations performed during a data retrieval session.

tags.name: DataRetrievalSession
tags.description: The `/DataRetrievalSessions` resource collection represents sessions created for retrieval jobs.

tags.name: EncryptionKey
tags.description: The `/EncryptionKeys` resource collection allows you to manage passwords that Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 uses to encrypt data that is being transferred to object storage repository.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: The `/Events` resource collection allows you to get a resource representation of Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 events.

tags.name: ExclusionSettings
tags.description: The `/ExclusionSettings` resource collection represents mailbox folders excluded from backup jobs.

tags.name: GlobalRetentionExclusionSettings
tags.description: The `/GlobalRetentionExclusionSettings` resource collection represents items excluded from the retention policy.

tags.name: BackupGroupData
tags.description: The `/BackupRepositories/{repositoryId}/GroupData` resource collection represents backed-up groups whose data is stored in a backup repository.

tags.name: Health
tags.description: The `/Health` resource collection represents information about actual health status of the NATS server and the PostgreSQL configuration database.

tags.name: InternetProxySettings
tags.description:
The `/InternetProxySettings` resource collection represents the internet proxy server settings.

Internet proxy servers can be assigned to the management server - a machine on which Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 is deployed - and each backup proxy server independently. When configured, Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 will use these internet proxies to manage backup jobs traffic.

tags.name: HistorySettings
tags.description: The `/HistorySettings` resource collection represents the history settings of backup and backup copy job sessions.

tags.name: License
tags.description: The `/License` resource collection allows you to manage a license installed in Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365.

tags.name: LicenseStatistic
tags.description: The `/licensing/statistic` resource collection represents a license usage report and allows you to submit a license usage report. This report includes statistic information on Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 licensing.

tags.name: LicensedUser
tags.description: The `/LicensedUsers` resource collection represents information about the licensed users in Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365.

tags.name: BackupMailboxData
tags.description: The `/BackupRepositories/{repositoryId}/MailboxData` resource collection represents backed-up mailboxes whose data is stored in a backup repository.

tags.name: ExchangeFolder
tags.description: The `/RestoreSessions/{restoreSessionId}/organization/mailboxes/{mailboxId}/folders` resource collection represents organization mailbox folders to explore and restore data and allows you to manage data in backed-up mailbox folders.

tags.name: ExchangeItem

tags.name: ExchangeMailbox
tags.description: The `/RestoreSessions/{restoreSessionId}/organization/mailboxes` resource collection represents organization mailboxes to explore and restore data and allows you to manage data in backed-up mailboxes.

tags.name: ManagementMode

tags.name: BackupOneDriveData
tags.description: The `/BackupRepositories/{repositoryId}/OneDriveData` resource collection represents backed-up OneDrives whose data is stored in a backup repository.

tags.name: OneDriveDocument

tags.name: OneDriveFolder
tags.description: The `/RestoreSessions/{restoreSessionId}/Organization/OneDrives/{oneDriveId}/Folders` resource collection represents OneDrive folders to explore and restore and allows you to manage backed-up OneDrive folders and their versions.

tags.name: OrganizationUserOneDrive

tags.description: The `/RestoreSessions/{restoreSessionId}/Organization/OneDrives` resource collection represents organization OneDrives to explore and restore data and allows you to manage data in backed-up OneDrives.

tags.name: BackupOrganizationData
tags.description: The `/BackupRepositories/{repositoryId}/OrganizationData` resource collection represents backed-up organizations whose data is stored in a backup repository.

tags.name: BackupOrganization

tags.name: OrganizationRetentionExclusion
tags.description:
The `/Organizations/{organizationId}/RetentionExclusion` resource collection represents items excluded from the retention policy for a specified organization.
NOTE
Excluding items using the organization ID overrides the global exclusion list.

tags.name: OrganizationGroupMember
tags.description: The `/Organizations/{organizationId}/Groups/{groupId}/Members` resource collection represents members of a specified group.

tags.name: OrganizationGroup
tags.description: The `/Organizations/{organizationId}/Groups` resource collection represents organization groups.

tags.name: OrganizationLicensingInformation
tags.description: The `/Organizations/{organizationId}/LicensingInformation` resource collection represents licensing information for a specified organization.

tags.name: OrganizationSite
tags.description: The `/Organizations/{organizationId}/Sites` resource collection represents organization sites.

tags.name: OrganizationTeam
tags.description: The `/Organizations/{organizationId}/Teams` resource collection represents organization teams.

tags.name: OrganizationUser
tags.description: The `/Organizations/{organizationId}/Users` resource collection represents organization users.

tags.name: Organization
tags.description:
The `/Organizations` resource collection represents Microsoft organizations added to Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 and allows you to add organizations to the Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 infrastructure and to manage them.

The `/Organization` resource collection represents information about Microsoft 365 and on-premises Microsoft organizations that were added as tenants by service providers.

For more information about the authorization process and security settings, see the Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 REST API Reference, section [Authorization for Organizations with Modern Authentication and Legacy Protocols or Basic Authentication](https://helpcenter.veeam.com/references/vbo365/8/rest/tag/SectionOverview#section/Authorization-and-Security/Authorization-for-Organizations-with-Modern-Authentication-and-Legacy-Protocols-or-Basic-Authentication).

The `/DeviceCode` resource collection allows you to obtain a device code to sign in to Microsoft Identity platform and to check whether a device code was used to sign in to Microsoft Identity platform.

tags.name: JobSessionObjects
tags.description: The `/JobSessions/{sessionId}/ProcessedObjects` resource collection represents objects processed by a specified job session.

tags.name: ProtectedData
tags.description: This set of endpoints represents objects that Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 protects and allows you to manage them.

tags.name: RbacRole
tags.description:
The `/RbacRoles` resource collection represents restore operator roles added to Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 and allows yu to manage restore operator roles.

The `/Organizations/{organizationId}/RbacRoles` resource allows you to add a restore operator role to an organization.

The Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 administrator adds restore operator roles to assign permissions to users (or groups) who act as restore operators. Restore operators are allowed to explore and restore data from backups created by Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 for specific organization object types (users, groups, sites, teams, or the entire Microsoft 365 organization).

tags.name: RestorePoint
tags.description: The `/RestorePoints` resource collection represents restore points created by Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365.

tags.name: RestorePortalSettings
tags.description: The `/RestorePortalSettings` resource collection represents settings used to connect to Restore Portal.

tags.name: RestoreSessionEvent
tags.description: The `/RestoreSessions/{restoreSessionId}/Events` resource collection represents events for a restore session.

tags.name: RestoreSession
tags.description: This set of endpoints represents restore sessions and allows you to manage them as well as to create a restore session for a tenant Microsoft organization or for a restore operator.

tags.name: AmazonS3CompatibleObjectStorage
tags.description: The `/S3CompatibleResources` resource collection represents S3 Compatible, IBM Cloud or Wasabi Cloud object storage buckets and folders.
tags.x-displayName: S3 Compatible Object Storage Buckets and Folders

tags.name: SharePointItem

tags.name: OrganizationSync
tags.description:
This set of endpoints represents status of synchronization of Microsoft organization objects with the organization cache database and allows you to start the synchronization process.
NOTE
Synchronization of objects with the organization cache database is only available for Microsoft organizations with modern app-only authentication.

tags.name: BackupTeamData
tags.description: The `/BackupRepositories/{repositoryId}/TeamData` resource collection represents backed-up teams whose data is stored in a backup repository.

tags.name: TeamsChannel
tags.description: The `/RestoreSessions/{restoreSessionId}/organization/teams/{teamId}/channels` resource collection represents Microsoft Teams channels to explore and restore and allows you to manage backed-up Microsoft Teams channels.

tags.name: TeamsFile
tags.description: The `/RestoreSessions/{restoreSessionId}/organization/teams/{teamId}/files` resource collection represents Microsoft Teams files to explore and restore and allows you to manage backed-up Microsoft Teams files.

tags.name: TeamsPost
tags.description: The `/RestoreSessions/{restoreSessionId}/organization/teams/{teamId}/posts` resource collection represents Microsoft Teams posts to explore and restore and allows you to manage backed-up Microsoft Teams posts.

tags.name: TeamsTeam
tags.description: The `/RestoreSessions/{restoreSessionId}/organization/teams` resource collection represents Microsoft Teams teams to explore and restore data and allows you to manage data in backed-up teams.

tags.name: TeamsTab
tags.description:
The `/RestoreSessions/{restoreSessionId}/organization/teams/{teamId}/channels/{channelId}/tabs` resource collection represents Microsoft Teams tabs to explore and restore and allows you to manage backed-up Microsoft Teams tabs.

The `/RestoreSessions/{restoreSessionId}/organization/teams/{teamId}/tabs/operatorRestore` resource collection allows restore operators to explore and restore tabs of multiple channels.

tags.name: BackupUserData
tags.description: The `/BackupRepositories/{repositoryId}/UserData` resource collection represents backed-up users whose data is stored in a backup repository.

tags.name: OrganizationRbac
tags.description:
The `/Organization/LoggedInUser` resource collection represents information about a Microsoft 365 organization users currently logged in to Restore Portal.
NOTE
Only Restore Portal users or restore operators can use this methods. Make sure to obtain an authorization token with the *operator* value selected from the **grant_type** drop-down list. For more information on how to obtain a token, see the Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 REST API Reference, section [Authorization for Restore Operators](https://helpcenter.veeam.com/references/vbo365/8/rest/tag/SectionOverview#section/Authorization-and-Security/Authorization-for-Restore-Operators).
tags.x-displayName: Users Logged In to Restore Portal

tags.name: VboEmailSettings
tags.description:
The `/VBOEmailSettings` resource collection represents email notification settings. Email notifications are sent from a backup proxy server upon each execution of a backup or backup copy job.
NOTE
Email notification settings are global and will be applied to all backup and backup copy jobs in Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365.
tags.x-displayName: Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 Email Notification Settings

tags.name: VexEmailSettings
tags.description:
The `/VexEmailSettings` resource collection represents Veeam Explorer for Microsoft Exchange email settings.

Veeam Explorer for Microsoft Exchange uses these settings to send Exchange items that are located in a backup by email and deliver export reports.
tags.x-displayName: Veeam Explorer for Microsoft Exchange Email Settings

tags.name: VeodEmailSettings
tags.description:
The `/VeodEmailSettings` resource collection represents Veeam Explorer for Microsoft OneDrive for Business email settings.

Veeam Explorer for Microsoft OneDrive for Business uses these settings to send Microsoft OneDrive items as attachments in email messages.
tags.x-displayName: Veeam Explorer for Microsoft OneDrive for Business Email Settings

tags.name: VespEmailSettings
tags.description:
The `/VespEmailSettings` resource collection represents Veeam Explorer for Microsoft SharePoint email settings.

Veeam Explorer for Microsoft SharePoint uses these settings to send Microsoft SharePoint items as attachments in email messages and deliver export reports.
tags.x-displayName: Veeam Explorer for Microsoft SharePoint Email Settings

tags.name: VetEmailSettings
tags.description:
The `/VetEmailSettings` resource collection represents Veeam Explorer for Microsoft Teams email settings.

Veeam Explorer for Microsoft Teams uses these settings to send Microsoft Teams posts and files as attachments in email messages and deliver export reports.
tags.x-displayName: Veeam Explorer for Microsoft Teams Email Settings

tags.name: ServiceInstance
tags.description: The `/ServiceInstance` resource collection represents information about Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 version and installation ID.
